name: RABBIT-SPEC-BUG-5
title: Version mismatch: feature.json declares 1.0.0 but spec.md declares 1.1.0
description: feature.json line 3 has 'version': '1.0.0' while docs/spec/spec.md frontmatter declares version: 1.1.0. These should be in sync. No test enforces this alignment. Fix: bump feature.json to match spec.md, and add a test asserting they are equal.

history.note: Fixed in Wave 3: feature.json version synced to spec.md (1.2.0); tests added for Inv 3 (schema documented) and Inv 5 (Step 4 before Step 5).
